query: SELECT ar.id, ar.status, ar.createdAt, a.titulo, u.name as solicitante FROM adjustment_requests ar LEFT JOIN actions a ON ar.actionId = a.id LEFT JOIN users u ON ar.solicitanteId = u.id WHERE a.titulo LIKE '%sem título%' OR a.titulo IS NULL OR a.titulo = '' ORDER BY ar.createdAt DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.671da1035469 --database Uksxtg83ZJDkZPJL3fCmwT --execute SELECT ar.id, ar.status, ar.createdAt, a.titulo, u.name as solicitante FROM adjustment_requests ar LEFT JOIN actions a ON ar.actionId = a.id LEFT JOIN users u ON ar.solicitanteId = u.id WHERE a.titulo LIKE '%sem título%' OR a.titulo IS NULL OR a.titulo = '' ORDER BY ar.createdAt DESC;
